<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D. From my current position, moving forward would go to row 02 column C which is lava (`L`), so I must not move forward. The safe move that keeps progress is to turn left to face up (`^`) and then proceed toward the open path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing up (`^`). The goal is at row 04 column D. Cell row 02 column C is lava (`L`), so I should avoid going right. From my current position, the safe forward cell (row 01 column B) is a wall (`#`), so I can’t move forward. I should turn right to face east and then look for a path avoiding lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D. From my current position, moving forward would hit lava at row 02 column C (`L`), so I should avoid that and instead turn to change direction. Turning right will face down, which is safer to explore.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B, facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04 column D. I need to move right but the cell to the right (row 02 column C) is lava `L`, so I must first go down to a safe path. I check forward: row 03 column B is `.`, safe, so I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 03 column B facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04 column D, so I need to move right and down toward it. The cell in front (row 04 column B) is floor `.` and safe, so I’ll move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 04 column B, facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04 column D. To get there, I need to face right and move through row 04 columns C (floor) then D (goal). From down to right requires a TURN_LEFT.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 04 column B, facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D. The cell at row 04 column C is floor (`.`), so I can move forward into C safely, keeping direction toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 04 column C facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D. The cell in front of me (row 04 column D) is `G`, so I should move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>

</action>
